---
title: "STAT380_MP2"
author: 
- name: Isaac Swope
- name: Andrew Loiselle
date: "2026-03-31"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Front Matter
```{r}
# Libraries

# Functions

# Data

```



## Task 1


## Task 2: Variable Exploration


## Task 3: Variable Relations


## Task 4


## Task 5
